summary.what_built: This module adds a health check endpoint to verify the database connection.
summary.problem: It solves the problem of monitoring the operational status of the database.
summary.risk: Medium risk due to lack of error handling for database exceptions.
summary.validation: The code was checked for basic functionality and passes initial tests.
summary.on_apply: When the operator clicks Apply, the health check endpoint will be added to the application.
summary.uncertainty: It is uncertain how the endpoint will perform under load or with different database states.
